title: botrychium lunaria var. simplex
intro: Botrychium lunaria var. simplex, also known as the moonwort, is a type of plant that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of moonwort include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Moonwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
